emails.subject: Deal 156071 Feb 00
emails.body: Deal 156071 Feb 00 Daren, This is one of the deals which you told me to zero out. Unfortunately, I do not allocate PGEV. Also, Sherlyn has actualized PGEV and she has the support from the pipeline for the 1746918 volume. Please let me know if I had missed something in our conversation. Thanks Thu
